title: Registry-liveness swap + open-set persistence + resume-by-id + session endpoints

tests.summary: 36 passed — resume-by-id (incl. shell-injection rejection), open-set (incl. write-race, hook map-key routing, 4 hook/open identity-race variants, tombstone-no-resurrect), endpoints+reboot-restore (incl. distinct-tabs + invalid-id 400), registry liveness

e2e.summary: n/a — backend; UI lands in DS3

codexReview.notes: r1(4)→r2(3)→r3(2)→r4(1)→r5(1)→r6(1)→r7(1) — EVERY finding real and fixed forward with a committed regression (identity-collapse, write races, shell injection, worktree-pin, hook map-key routing, fallback/cleanup+worktrees serialization, resume wiring, 4 hook/open duplicate/overwrite variants, tombstone-resurrect). Round 8 (confirming the r7 fix) FAILED to run: 'codex exec → ERROR: Your workspace is out of credits.' No clean approve reached → slice is BLOCKED on the cross-model gate, not passed.

codexPwTest.notes: backend; UI Playwright pass lands in DS3

blockers.cause: external — Codex/ChatGPT workspace out of credits
blockers.failedCommand: codex exec -s read-only --skip-git-repo-check -C <repo> --output-schema codex-review.schema.json --output-last-message <out> "<DS2 round-8 review prompt>"
blockers.error: ERROR: Your workspace is out of credits. Add credits to continue.
blockers.remediation: Operator must top up Codex/ChatGPT workspace credits; then re-run DS2 round-8 review (expected approve) to clear.
blockers.impact: Cross-model gate (3A review + 3B Playwright) unavailable for DS2 round-8 confirmation and all remaining slices.
